rationale: TcpClient Close/Dispose implementation cleanup; internal .NET resource management, no spec rule involved.
Deserialization of object array with int32 fails with FileFormatException; C#-specific serializer bug, no specific BSON spec rule cited.
Publishing API docs at api.mongodb.org; documentation/infrastructure task, no driver behavior.
DateTime timezone offset bug; C#-specific date handling issue, BSON spec does not define timezone conversion behavior.
Including XML documentation in release packages; packaging/documentation improvement, no spec relevance.
Deadlock in BsonDefaultSerializer/BsonClassMap under multithreaded AutoMap; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule violated.
MSI build warnings about duplicate target entries; build/packaging issue, no spec relevance.
Install DLLs to program folder in addition to GAC; packaging/setup issue, no spec relevance.
BsonBuffer infinite loop on gracefully closed connection; networking/implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
MaxDocumentSize default hardcoded to 4MB instead of 16MB; coding error in default constant, not a BSON spec deviation per se.
MapReduce overloads not defaulting out option to Inline; API design bug, no cross-driver spec rule involved.
Remove System.Data dependency; internal refactor/dependency cleanup, no spec behavior affected.
System.Char serialized as Number instead of String; C#-specific type mapping, BSON spec does not define Char-to-BSON mapping.
System.Decimal serialized as String instead of Number; C#-specific type mapping, BSON spec does not define Decimal-to-BSON mapping.
Unnecessary discriminator lookup for sealed types; internal serializer optimization, no spec rule violated.
Save throws exception when Id is a composite class; C#-specific ORM/mapping bug, no cross-driver spec involved.
GridFS spec requires MD5 verification on upload/download; driver skipped this check entirely.
SafeMode permissive flag to avoid exception overhead; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Add non-generic Insert overloads for PowerShell support; language-binding ergonomics, no spec behavior change.
GridFS upload misinterprets partial network stream read as EOF; implementation bug, no specific GridFS spec rule about network stream reading.
findAndModify throws exception when no document found; server behavior workaround, spec did not define this error case at the time.
Save fails with duplicate key when Id is BsonRepresentation ObjectId string; C#-specific ORM mapping bug, no cross-driver spec.
Add non-generic method overloads for PowerShell/reflection-driven programming; language ergonomics, no spec behavior.
Better exception message when deserializing structs; error message improvement, no spec rule.
NullReferenceException when disposing cursor after connection failure; implementation resource management bug, no specific spec rule.
GridFS MD5 computation performance option; perf optimization for multi-step uploads, no spec rule violated.
Query.And/Or accepting nulls; API ergonomics improvement, no spec behavior.
GridFS OpenCreate not saving Metadata field; C#-specific API bug, GridFS spec does not define Metadata behavior.
GetMore exception when inside RequestStart scope; internal connection management bug, no spec rule violated.
GridFS.Find returns IEnumerable instead of MongoCursor; API ergonomics improvement, no spec behavior.
Shell JsonOutputMode writes BinData without 'new' keyword; JSON output format bug for shell compatibility, not BSON spec.
EnsureIndex doesn't recreate index after DropCollection; internal index caching bug, no spec rule.
Redundant _t discriminator in Dictionary with non-string keys; C#-specific serializer quirk, BSON spec doesn't define discriminator placement rules.
Concurrency race condition between Disconnect and AcquireConnection under high load; threading bug, no spec rule.
Cannot map class with self-referential member type; C#-specific class mapper bug, no spec relevance.
NullReferenceException on first connection to replica set; race condition in connection management, no specific SDAM spec rule.
NullReferenceException in Disconnect when connectionPool still null during async connect; threading/null-check bug, no spec rule.
Replica set initiation fails because driver throws 'Primary server not found'; RS initialization use case, not an SDAM spec violation.
Update.Rename not combinable with other update ops; C#-specific builder API bug, no spec rule on fluent builder chaining.
Unit test hardcodes server error message string that changed in 1.8.1; test maintenance, no driver behavior.
Unit tests failing against MongoDB 1.6.5 due to version-specific server behaviors; test compatibility, no spec issue.
Add CreateCollection overload taking only name; API convenience addition, no spec behavior.
Add FindUser/FindAllUsers methods; new API feature, no spec rule violated.
Deserializing to interface fails; C#-specific ORM/polymorphism bug, no spec rule.
Cannot query MongoDBRef properties; C#-specific DBRef query API limitation, not a CRUD spec rule.
Insert should reject element names starting with $ or containing dot; validation improvement, no specific spec rule cited requiring this.
IPv6 connection regression in 1.1 driver; networking/connection bug, not a connection string spec violation.
DateTime.MaxValue BSON encoding changed between 1.0 and 1.1; backward compat issue, BSON spec does not specify DateTime.MaxValue encoding.
JsonReader fails on various regex forms; JSON parsing limitation in C# driver, not a BSON wire spec issue.
JsonReader fails on Date() expression forms; JSON parsing convenience feature, not a BSON spec requirement.
